title: TLR Camera - Resource Pack for Mortuusars Exposure Mod
description: This is a retexture and re-model of the camera in Mortuusars Exposure Mod.
body:
![A Twin lens reflex camera on a pink terracotta textured floor with text saying TLR for Mortuusars Exposure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36ddb97bef5d04404c25efaffb9270fb02df8898.jpeg)![" pictures showing the camera in game with one showing the camera viewfinder being closed and the other showing it open](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba69ec88d0bff208baf9198306af1c80a761eedf_0.webp)This is a re-model and retexture of the camera from **[Mortuusars Exposure Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)**.I was Inspired by one of my own cameras, the Yashica-Mat, and wanted to recreate it in Minecraft for the Exposure mod. I hope you enjoy!

**Original Mod Creator** - [https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars](https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars)
---
**Exposure Mod** - [https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
---
**Incompatible with - [Moon Camera](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moon-camera-mortuusars-exposure-mod)**
